mapper.sql:
WHERE boardType LIKE 'faq/%'
AND boardType LIKE CONCAT( 'faq/', #{category1}, '/%' )
AND boardType = CONCAT( 'faq/', #{category1}, '/', #{category2} )
mapper.select: SELECT boardNo, memberUid, boardType, title, content, fileId, createdAt FROM board WHERE boardNo = #{boardNo} AND boardType LIKE 'faq/%'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO board ( memberUid, boardType, title, content, fileId, createdAt ) VALUES ( #{memberUid}, #{boardType}, #{title}, #{content}, #{fileId}, NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE board SET boardType = #{boardType}, title = #{title}, content = #{content}, fileId = #{fileId} WHERE boardNo = #{boardNo} AND boardType LIKE 'faq/%'
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM board WHERE boardType LIKE 'faq/%' AND boardNo IN
#{boardNo}
